texto: Get it? Gender is a country, a field of signifying roses you can walk through, or wear tucked behind your ear.Eventually the flower wilts & you can pick another, or burn the field, or turn & run back across the tracks.(from "Essay on the Theory of Motion")
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Cameron Awkward-Rich que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Get it? Gender is a country, a field of signifying roses you can walk through, or wear tucked beh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, gender, poetry, com foco em termino e poetry.
